objective: Run a daily CI failure triage loop and dispatch one scoped repair goal when evidence is concrete
workspace_setup: Open /workspace/product-app as a Codex Project before starting; writing Workers use isolated worktrees

workers.scope: read-only discovery and classification of CI failures
validation: inspect supplied CI logs and local git evidence read-only

workers.scope: repair one selected low-risk failure inside approved scope

acceptance_criteria: Triage returns evidence-backed TRIAGE_ACTIONABLE or TRIAGE_NO_ACTION
At most one selected low-risk repair is dispatched
Any repair passes local validation and independent exact-artifact review

goals.objective: Inspect the declared CI evidence and select at most one concrete low-risk failure
success_criteria: Return TRIAGE_ACTIONABLE with one finding and evidence, or TRIAGE_NO_ACTION with evidence
Do not modify files or dispatch implementation directly
validation: inspect supplied CI logs and local git evidence read-only

goals.objective: Repair the single finding selected by CI-T1 without expanding scope
goals.dispatch_when: CI-T1 status is TRIAGE_ACTIONABLE and the finding has concrete evidence, allowed scope, and validation
success_criteria: The selected failure is repaired inside approved files
npm test, lint, and typecheck pass
Independent Reviewer approves the exact Worker worktree diff

claim: triage and candidate repair only; not merge-ready until independent review and CI confirmation
time_typical: 1-2 小时完成首轮，之后每次 wakeup 约 10-30 分钟
time_max: 半天，若 CI/connector 不稳定会更长
automation: Create one startup heartbeat for this bounded triage/repair queue and pause it after terminal closeout
discovery: GitHub Actions failures, open PR checks, recent commits, failing local tests, user triage notes
connectors: GitHub connector if exposed; otherwise workspace CI log files and manually supplied URLs
worktree_policy: one isolated worktree for implementation; triage is read-only; Reviewer uses same-directory fork; State-Writer remains in control-plane checkout
review: review required before PASS if any code/config/PR diff exists
